page: Microsoft Azure EC64es_v6 is an ECEV6 family memory-optimized virtual machine instance. It is powered by an Intel processor with an x86_64 architecture, featuring 64 dedicated virtual CPUs managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server type does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external network-attached volumes. It is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent disks. There are zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance.

Given its high memory density of 8.0 GB per core and dedicated CPU allocation, the EC64es_v6 offers a specialized resource profile tailored for memory-intensive workloads rather than general-purpose compute. The lack of local storage represents a tradeoff, shifting storage costs and performance characteristics entirely to external storage configurations. This instance is designed for workloads such as large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise applications, and memory-heavy data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure EC64es_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECEV6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an Intel x86_64 processor with 64 dedicated vCPUs and 512.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. This instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, allowing connection to high-performance external storage volumes. It does not provide complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for memory-intensive enterprise applications, the EC64es_v6 is suited for large-scale relational databases, in-memory analytics, and data warehousing workloads where high memory capacity and dedicated CPU resources are required to maintain consistent performance.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC64es_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 512 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability for demanding database and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated processor cores and high memory density for enterprise databases and in-memory workloads.
